request for DMA channel</span></div><div><span> <span style="color: rgb(121, 94, 38);">dma_channel_acknowledge_irq1</span>(<span style="color: rgb(0, 16, 128);">read_chan</span>);</span></div><span><br></span><div><span style="color: rgb(0, 128, 0);"> // go through all bitplanes in BCM_SEQUENCE</span></div><div><span> <span style="color: rgb(175, 0,
